detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Breast._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Breast.sol#711-843):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Breast.sol#783)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Breast.sol#857-869)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Breast.sol#789)
		- _charityliqAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Breast.sol#877)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Breast.sol#879)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Breast.sol#841)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Breast.sol#1007)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Breast.sol#987)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Breast.sol#989)
	Breast._rOwned (Breast.sol#361) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Breast._takeTeam(uint256) (Breast.sol#1001-1009)
	- Breast._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Breast.sol#961-997)
	- Breast.balanceOf(address) (Breast.sol#537-541)
	- Breast.constructor() (Breast.sol#463-501)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Breast.sol#841)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Breast.sol#1015)
	Breast._rTotal (Breast.sol#373) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Breast._getCurrentSupply() (Breast.sol#1165-1177)
	- Breast._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Breast.sol#1013-1019)
	- Breast.constructor() (Breast.sol#463-501)
	- Breast.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Breast.sol#633-655)
